title: Does anyone have any suggestions for Monday.com Apps to ingrate into SAP?

posts.author: KieranBiscoe (Kieran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,

I’m curious to see if anyone knows of any apps or other solutions that have worked in linking Monday.com to SAP?

The company I work for uses SAP for most things financial but on a departmental level we are using Monday.com for virtually everything else, including tracking and monitoring open orders. I’m very curious to see if there can be a bridge between the two platforms and possibly use Monday.com to trigger actions in SAP and then have Monday.com pull data from SAP (more exactly the PDFs SAP is capable of generating).

Would love to know people’s thoughts and experiences with this.

Many Thanks,
Kieran

posts.author: MatiasDamianWitt (Matias Damian Witt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kieran, i dont know if you already noticed but there is an intergration between Monday and SAP.
its in the intergration store an costs a few dollors but i think it would be worth it to sink up all you data.
here a link to the publisher of the app:
